theoremName: full-theta source noncollapse algebra consequence theorem

constantsInputStatus.label: closed source quadrature constants
constantsInputStatus.reason: The imported constants theorem has closed the source perturbation and theta-tail bounds.

gapStabilityStatus.label: rank stability gap inequality
gapStabilityStatus.reason: The perturbation is less than one quarter of the active/complement gap, so the active Riesz subspace is stable.

finiteActiveRankStatus.label: finite active response rank
finiteActiveRankStatus.reason: The two finite active response singular values and rank margin are positive.

fullThetaSourceNoncollapseStatus.label: full-Phi source noncollapse algebra consequence
fullThetaSourceNoncollapseStatus.reason: The gap-stability inequality and positive response margin imply rank(LE^*|U_delta)=2.

formalProof: The source perturbation bound is below one quarter of the active/complement gap.
Davis-Kahan/Riesz stability keeps a two-dimensional active source subspace.
The finite active response has positive smallest singular value and positive rank margin.
The transported active response therefore remains rank two for the full-Phi source model.
nextProofTarget: Import this symbolic implication in the full-theta source noncollapse theorem.
